MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Assigned Case Managment Conference.
Dept. 220, Judge: James J. McBride; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty; CSR: Not Reported.

Suzanne Rischman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Edwart Rotstein.
No appearance by defendant Terrafusion, Inc.
Order Granting Peter C. McMahon & McMahon Serepca LLP's motion to be relieved as counsel of record for defendant Terrafusion, Inc. was entered on March 28, 2014.

After considering several suggestions from counsel, the Court sets this matter on the Master Jury Calendar for Monday, February 23, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 206.

The Court shall serve notice on defendant, but it is suggested that counsel for plaintiff should serve notice on defendant as well.
